description: A unique way of installing and maintaining mods in Grand Theft Auto V
pre_install: if (!(Test-Path "$env:GTAV_PATH\PlayGTAV.exe")) {error 'Please create the environment variable GTAV_PATH pointing to your GTAV directory before installing this package.'; break}
Remove-Item "$dir\ModLoader\_PLACE ALL THIS IN THE GAME ROOT", "$dir\ModLoader\lml\_MODS GO HERE" -Force
